title: Michel-Ange Balikwisha
body: Michel-Ange Sumaï N'Koyi Limpata Balikwisha (born 10 May 2001) is a Congolese professional footballer who plays as a forward for Scottish Premiership side Celtic. Born in Belgium, he plays for the DR Congo national team.
categories: 21st-century Democratic Republic of the Congo sportsmen
